hero.subtitle: Your hair salon in Carcavelos. Specialists in colour, highlights and hair treatments.

about.heading: Passion for beauty, dedication to our clients
about.p1: Bella Hair Salon was born from a passion for the art of hair and the desire to provide a unique experience to every client. Located in the heart of Carcavelos, we are specialists in hair colour, highlights and hair treatments.
about.p2: Our team of highly qualified professionals exclusively uses premium products such as Kérastase, L'Oréal Professionnel and Olaplex, ensuring the best results for your hair.

services.heading: Everything your hair needs
services.subtitle: We offer a full range of beauty services so you always look and feel radiant.
services.hair1Desc: Personalised cut to enhance your natural beauty
services.hair2Desc: Classic or modern cut, always stylish
services.hair3Desc: Gentle and fun cut for the little ones
services.hair4Desc: Volume and shine for a perfect finish
services.hair5Desc: Hairstyles for weddings, parties and special events
services.color1Desc: Total transformation with vibrant, long-lasting colours
services.color2Desc: Natural technique for a luminous, sophisticated effect
services.color4Desc: Enhance and intensify your natural colour
services.color5Desc: Specialists in correcting previous colour treatments
services.treat1Desc: Intensive nourishment for dry and fragile hair
services.treat2Desc: Intense softness and shine without harsh chemicals
services.treat3Desc: Smooth, disciplined hair with natural movement
services.treat5Desc: Free assessment of your hair condition
services.beauty1Desc: Complete nail care with a perfect finish
services.beauty4Desc: Perfect shape for a more expressive look
services.beauty5Desc: Volume and natural lashes for a stunning look

pricing.subtitle: Fair and transparent prices. No surprises.

gallery.subtitle: Every client is a work of art. See some of our transformations.

team.heading: Professionals passionate about what they do
team.subtitle: Meet the specialists who care for your hair with dedication and talent.

reviews.heading: What our clients say
reviews.subtitle: Our clients' opinions are our greatest reward.
reviews.r1Text: I had my balayage done with Ana and it turned out absolutely beautiful! I was a client elsewhere but I'll never go anywhere else now. Natural and long-lasting results.
reviews.r2Text: Welcoming atmosphere, super friendly team and incredible results. Mariana really knows her stuff when it comes to hair treatments.
reviews.r3Text: I came for the first time for a gel manicure and loved it! Fair prices and excellent quality. I've already been back three times this month.
reviews.r4Text: Sofia did a stunning updo for my wedding. Everyone asked where I had my hair done. 100% recommended!
reviews.r5Text: I had a colour correction after a bad experience at another salon. Ana saved my hair! Professionalism at its best.
reviews.r6Text: Best salon on the Cascais line! Consistency, quality and attention to detail. They are my salon for life.
